entities.description: A technique employing microlysimeters of various dimensions and ages to measure soil evaporation

entities.name: EVAPORATION

entities.description: The accounting of water inputs and outputs in a crop system

entities.name: LAND SURFACE ENERGY BALANCE
entities.description: The equilibrium of energy fluxes at the earth's surface

entities.name: RAIN
entities.description: A weather event that triggers changes in soil evaporation rates

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Vegetation in the field whose root activity influences water extraction and evaporation measurements

entities.name: ROOT EXTRACTION OF WATER
entities.description: The process of water uptake by plant roots from the soil profile
